title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF JEPACA BARRIO SCHOOL IN BARRIO JELICUON LUSAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF CABATUAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO TO PABLO MUYUELA BARRIO SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 16729 / 65 OG No. 26, 6570 (June 30, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5383, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF JEPACA BARRIO SCHOOL IN BARRIO JELICUON LUSAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF CABATUAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO TO PABLO MUYUELA BARRIO SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Jepaca Barrio School in Barrio Jelicuon Lusaya, Municipality of Cabatuan, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Pablo Muyuela Barrio School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall lake effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
